text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tryouts—where Umamusume of all backgrounds meet their destined
trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by a nearby shrine to make a quick wish in hopes of meeting
the absolute best Umamusume.

Whoaaaaa! Do my eyes deceive me, or is that shining emblem what I
think it is?!

So the fated day has finally arrived! My trainer has appeared before
me!
choice_data_list: If it's money you're after, I don't have any.

text_block_list.text:
Waaah?! Just who do you think I am?! I'm an upstanding Umamusume!
I'd never do something so nefarious!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. I haven't introduced myself. Sorry about that! Call me
Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've been waitin' and waitin' for the One to show up. Finally! All that waiting has paid off!
choice_data_list: The One? What are you talking about?
The One? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about none other than you, of course!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A mere few hours ago, the great Shiraoki revealed to me that I must
come to this shrine and try my luck by drawing a fortune.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And surprise, surprise—it said I would "meet the One" at this very
spot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's when you showed up, just like it said you would!
choice_data_list: I think you've got the wrong person.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: H-hooold on, don't you move! I've got the right person—I know it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just think about it for a moment! I'm an Umamusume, and you're a
trainer! Isn't this too perfect to just be some kind of coincidence?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our meeting was fated—predestined to happen and divined by the
great Shiraoki herself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Tis not the time to dawdle! We must rise to the challenge and seize
our future by running in the Twinkle Series—you and me, together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's really going to make me her trainer if I don't say anything.
choice_data_list:
Sorry, but I can't be your trainer without getting
to know you first.

Sorry, but I can't be your trainer without getting
to know you first.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fair enough. That checks out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Got it! In that case, please hear me out! There's this event where I can
show you who I really am!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: At the upcoming tryouts, I'll prove to you my worth as a runner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you regret that you didn't scout me right here and now, just
you wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when you eventually change your mind, that's when we'll start
training! But for now, I've gotta hit it! Great fortune await me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that final exclamation, the young girl by the name of
Matikanefukukitaru dashed off into the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I make my way to the racetrack and see all the hopeful
Umamusume deeply focused on training for the upcoming tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Let's give this our best shot! Got it, Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... Why did you bring me here? What are we doing at the
racetrack?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's carrot divination said that I'd be lucky during partner running
practice! So you gotta practice with me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... If that's all you're asking for, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to
help...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Thanks a bunch! I'll give you a little charm later as a
gift! It makes you separate all your disposable chopsticks perfectly
down the middle!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All righty then... Since today's lucky number is 39, let's do thirty-nine
laps around the course!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What?! You do realize that one lap is two kilometers, right?
Thirty-nine laps would be over sixty kilometers...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Not a problem! The lucky number never lies!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: H-hey! We aren't really doing this, are we?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Dang it... Maybe thirty-nine was too much...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I told you so... And running at full speed from the very start definitely didn't help...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But we ran this far precisely because we set such a high bar! It's all
thanks to today's lucky number!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We only ran four laps though...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's move on now! The carrots told me that swimming is the
best training to do next, so to the pool we go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's lucky number is 39, so let's swim across the pool and back
thirty-nine times!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I beg of you... Enough with your lucky number...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a strange—perhaps even fateful—encounter... Does
Matikanefukukitaru really have what it takes to prove herself at
tryouts?
